stemHtml: Select the option which correctly describes real wander and apparent wander.

options.a: Real wander is the discernable movement of the spin axis due to the movement of the aircraft over the Earth's surface.
options.b: Apparent wander is the actual misalignment of the spin axis due to mechanical defects in the gyroscope.
options.c: Real wander is the actual misalignment of the spin axis due to mechanical defects in the gyroscope.
options.d: Real wander is the discernable movement of the spin axis due to the reference frame in space.
